title: Session todos management tools with file I/O and concurrency control
purpose: Provides MCP tools for managing per-session todo items stored in JSON files with thread-safe write operations and schema validation.
module_context: Exports type definitions for session todos and their file structure, schema definitions for all tool interfaces, and a global mutex map for coordinating concurrent file writes across projects and sessions.

methods.name: withLock
methods.normalized_params: (project: string, session: string, fn: () => Promise<T>): Promise<T>

steps.content: Generate a unique key from project and session identifiers.
Retrieve the previous promise for this key or use a resolved promise as default.
Chain the provided function to the previous promise to ensure sequential execution.
Store the new promise in the mutex map and set up cleanup to remove it on resolution or rejection.
Return the chained promise to ensure the function executes after previous operations complete.
Construct the file path for session todos using project root, collab directory, sessions subdirectory, session name, and the todos filename.
Generate the file path for the session todos file.
Attempt to read the file content as UTF-8 text.
Parse the file content as JSON and validate its structure.
IF parsing fails or the structure is invalid, return a default empty todos file.
ELSE return the parsed todos file with validated structure.

methods.name: writeSessionTodosFile
methods.normalized_params: (project: string, session: string, data: SessionTodosFile): Promise<void>

steps.content: Generate the file path for the session todos file.
Create the directory path for the file if it does not exist.
Serialize the data to JSON with indentation and write it to the file.
Generate the current timestamp in ISO format.

methods.name: listSessionTodos
methods.normalized_params: (project: string, session: string, opts: ListSessionTodosOptions): Promise<SessionTodo[]>

steps.content: Read the session todos file for the specified project and session.
Filter the todos based on whether completed items should be included.
Sort the filtered todos by their order property.
Return the sorted list of todos.

methods.name: addSessionTodo
methods.normalized_params: (project: string, session: string, text: string): Promise<SessionTodo>

steps.content: Trim the input text and validate that it is not empty.
Acquire a lock for the project and session to prevent concurrent writes.
Read the current session todos file.
Determine the maximum order value among existing todos.
Create a new todo with the provided text, default properties, and calculated order.
Add the new todo to the todos list and increment the next id.
Write the updated todos file back to disk.
Return the newly created todo.

methods.name: updateSessionTodo
methods.normalized_params: (project: string, session: string, id: number, updates: { text?: string; completed?: boolean; order?: number }): Promise<SessionTodo>

steps.content: Trim the text if it is provided in updates and validate that it is not empty.
Acquire a lock for the project and session to prevent concurrent writes.
Read the current session todos file.
Find the todo with the specified id.
IF the todo is not found, throw an error.
Update the todo's properties with the provided values.
Update the todo's last modified timestamp.
Write the updated todos file back to disk.
Return the updated todo.

methods.name: toggleSessionTodo
methods.normalized_params: (project: string, session: string, id: number, completed?: boolean): Promise<SessionTodo>

steps.content: Acquire a lock for the project and session to prevent concurrent writes.
Read the current session todos file.
Find the todo with the specified id.
IF the todo is not found, throw an error.
Determine the next completion state based on provided value or toggle current state.
Update the todo's completion state.
Update the todo's last modified timestamp.
Write the updated todos file back to disk.
Return the updated todo.

methods.name: removeSessionTodo
methods.normalized_params: (project: string, session: string, id: number): Promise<SessionTodo>

steps.content: Acquire a lock for the project and session to prevent concurrent writes.
Read the current session todos file.
Find the index of the todo with the specified id.
IF the todo is not found, throw an error.
Remove the todo from the todos list.
Write the updated todos file back to disk.
Return the removed todo.
Acquire a lock for the project and session to prevent concurrent writes.
Read the current session todos file.
Count the number of todos before filtering.
Filter out completed todos from the todos list.
Calculate the number of removed todos.
IF any todos were removed, write the updated todos file back to disk.
Return the count of removed todos.

methods.name: reorderSessionTodos
methods.normalized_params: (project: string, session: string, orderedIds: number[]): Promise<SessionTodo[]>

steps.content: Acquire a lock for the project and session to prevent concurrent writes.
Read the current session todos file.
Validate that the orderedIds array matches the number of existing todos.
Validate that orderedIds contains no duplicates.
Validate that orderedIds contains only existing todo ids.
Update the order and timestamp properties of todos based on the orderedIds.
Reorder the todos list according to orderedIds.
Write the updated todos file back to disk.
Return the reordered list of todos.
